name: Safe Player Difficulty Override
description: Raises the vanilla limit from 8 to the verified-safe maximum of 14 across the server, /players command, and Offline Difficulty Scaling UI. Values above 14 are clamped before reaching gameplay state.

patches.description: Raise the server-side accepted difficulty ceiling from 8 to 14
Raise the /players command maximum from 8 to 14 while retaining the vanilla 1-to-maximum clamp
Set the primary initialized Offline Difficulty Scaling range to 1 through 14
Set the primary fallback Offline Difficulty Scaling maximum to 14
Set the secondary initialized Offline Difficulty Scaling range to 1 through 14
Set the secondary fallback Offline Difficulty Scaling maximum to 14
